title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is an LLM released by MoonShot AI designed as a capable coding model with improved performance on long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. The model represents continued maturation of capabilities from Chinese AI labs.
